name: Australia Consumer Price Index (All Groups)
notes: ABS CPI dataflow — all-groups CPI index weighted avg of 8 capital cities. Renamed AUS_CPI->AUS_CPI_INDEX 2026-07-07 (CPI-definition split). Verified live 2026-05-28 (101.7 @ 2026-Q1). Keyless SDMX-CSV.

name: Australia Real GDP (Chain Volume Measures)
notes: ABS ANA_AGG — GDP chain volume measures seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (693772 @ 2025-Q4).

name: Australia Real GDP Growth (QoQ)
notes: ABS ANA_AGG — GDP chain volume measures quarter-on-quarter %-change seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (0.8% @ 2025-Q4).

name: Australia Unemployment Rate
notes: ABS LF dataflow — unemployment rate persons aged 15+ seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (4.49% @ 2026-04).

name: Australia Labour Force Participation Rate
notes: ABS LF dataflow — participation rate persons aged 15+ seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (66.7% @ 2026-04).

name: Australia Monthly CPI (All Groups)
notes: ABS CPI dataflow, monthly frequency slice — the complete monthly CPI the ABS introduced from the Nov-2025 publication cycle (the CPI dataflow now carries FREQ=M alongside the legacy Q; the old CPI_M 'monthly CPI indicator' dataflow froze at 2025-09 with the transition). All-groups, weighted avg of 8 capital cities, original terms. Live series starts 2024-04; depth 2017-09→2024-03 is seeded into the sister archive from the frozen CPI_M indicator rebased across the overlap (scripts/backfill_aus_cpi_monthly.py). Before 2017-09 Australia has no monthly CPI — quarterly AUS_CPI_INDEX (1948-09+) is the fallback, per regime-aa memo 2026-07-08-monthly-growth-inflation-cadence item 4. Verified live 2026-07-09 (102.1 @ 2026-05). Keyless SDMX-CSV.

name: Australia Employed Persons (Total)
notes: ABS LF dataflow — employed persons total (measure M3), persons aged 15+, seasonally adjusted. Monthly realized-growth proxy per regime-aa memo 2026-07-08-monthly-growth-inflation-cadence item 4 (Australia publishes no monthly IP or monthly GDP; employment is the deepest monthly real-activity series, 1978-02+, n=580). Verified live 2026-07-09 (14,738.8k @ 2026-05).
